title: Team leader/Nurse substitute Attendo Kellokas Oulu
jobcategory_keywords: Personal care workers in health services not elsewhere classified
jobcontent:
We are looking for a team leader-nurse to replace Attendo Kellokkaas in Oulu. Kellokkaas has 15 resident places for adults with developmental disabilities. Each of our residents deserves to be seen as themselves and to live a full life. As a team leader and nurse, you are a key support for both the residents and the work community. You do work where you care, guide and develop together with the team. What is your role? You lead and support the staff in their daily work and ensure the smoothness of care. with You will develop the working methods of the working community, take care of the working atmosphere and identify training needs. The work will be done on a weekday morning and we can agree on the start time of the employment relationship with you. What do we expect from you? Education in the social and health field: nurse. Experience in managing personnel and teamwork in social and health services. from the start Criminal record extract in employment for more than three months, when working with minors, elderly or disabled people Social Security professional card or readiness to obtain it We value a genuine interest in working with the disabled, a solution-oriented approach, persistence and the ability to support and motivate the team. The most important thing for us is that we are above all a home for our residents. What do we offer? Close to leadership Your supervisor is present in everyday life and supports you in practical work and development. Opportunities for development Wide range of training and support for professional development and career advancement. Flexibility The opportunity affects work shifts and the coordination of work and the rest of life.Employment benefitsFree coffee/tea and meal benefitEdenred benefit in accordance with the practice defined by the employerEmployee benefits program and discounts from several service providersComprehensive occupational health careTraining opportunities and support for skill developmentSalary and terms of employment are determined by the collective agreement of the private social service sector. Salary grade G23D and the team leader's task-specific supplement. Please note that we are a smoke-free workplace. Application and additional information The application period ends on April 30, 2026, but the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found, send your application soon through the recruitment system. For more information about the position, please contact the manager of the Attendo home. Attendo Future care leader. We strengthen the person and make the home a home for our residents. More information about the task is provided by: Director of Attendo home Liisa RäihäP. 044 494 4509liisa.raiha@attendo.fi

Attendo The trendsetter of future care
Attendo is the leading provider of care services in the Nordic countries. Our mission is to strengthen people so that everyone who lives with us can live a full life in their own way. We offer care and housing services for the elderly, mentally disabled, disabled, drug and mental health rehabilitators. We also offer therapy services. We are above all a home for our residents, a partner for our stakeholders and a strong force for change in society. About 17,000 of our employees serve in more than 400 offices around Finland. We strengthen people. We look forward. We solve together. We are Attendo.

title: Safety device installer Käytäslukko Oy
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: the equipment used in the building's electronic access control
jobcontent:
As a safety device installer, you work as part of a close working community in safety technology in installation, maintenance and repair tasks. Your tasks include, for example, the installation, commissioning and maintenance of crime detectors, access control and camera surveillance systems. The customer is at the center of our operations, so you must know how to listen to the customer. You get along with different people. The systems we use represent the cutting edge of technological development in their field, and continuous training is invested in the competence of the personnel. Honesty, openness, customer orientation and reliability describe our core values, these are also expected of you. Due to the nature of the work, integrity is an absolute prerequisite.
The office of the assignment is located in Vantaa and the work mainly takes place in the Uusimaa area, but there are also installation sites outside of Uusimaa, so the job requires occasional travel.

We expect you to have previous work experience in security technology installation and maintenance tasks. The position also has the advantage of knowing the basics of electronic locking and telecommunications technology. The operator lock is ready to train an operator with a suitable professional background as part of the team.

We offer you the opportunity for a long-term employment relationship in an agile and adaptable family business. You get the opportunity to be at a vantage point to see and do the development of the industry, and at the same time develop yourself as a security professional. Salary according to the contract. Here is a great opportunity to become part of a growing and successful company where employees are happy!

Käytöslukko Oy is a pioneer in the security industry, founded in 1988. Our company has ISO-9001 and ISO-14001 and OHSAS-18001 quality certificates. We are a design and installation company for security systems and a locksmith approved by insurance companies. We also have S2 electrical contracting rights. Our company is a member of the Finnish Entrepreneurs' and Security Contractors' Association. The company has offices in Kangasa, Hämeenlinna, Jyväskylä, Vantaa and Oulu. Read more at: www.kayttolukko.fi

Applications with salary expectations https://kayttolukko.fi/hakulomake/ or hr@kayttolukko.fi

More information about the position hr@kayttolukko.fi or Minna Kytö-Lilja 050 4723587.

title: Marketing assistant
what_we_offer: Flexible cooperation as a freelancer / entrepreneur
The opportunity to influence and develop the brand
Long-term cooperation with the right person
An inspiring and growing beauty brand
Were you interested?
Send us:
A short introduction about yourself
Examples of your social media content (IG/TikTok)
Why you are the right fit for La Chica
Come join us in making La Chica even more visible and desirable
jobcontent:
**BRAND PROMOTER / MARKETING ASSISTANT (FREELANCER / ENTREPRENEUR)** La Chica beauty salons

Do you want to take part in building a strong and beautiful brand in the beauty industry?

We are looking for a visual and sales brand promoter for La Chica, who will help us increase visibility and bring more customers to our stores with the help of social media and content.

What are you going to do?

- You film and produce content (Reels, TikTok, IG posts)
 
- Ideas for campaigns and contents together with the team
 
- You make publications that are **visually in line with the La Chica brand**
 
- You write sales and customer-oriented texts for newsletters for customers
 
- You produce content that **actually brings bookings and customers**
 

What do we expect from you?

- Strong visual eye (Instagram aesthetic in possession)
 
- Experience with social media content (photography + editing)
 
- An understanding of what sells and what works
 
- Independent approach to work and initiative
 
- Interest in the beauty industry
 

What do we offer?

- Flexible cooperation as a freelancer / entrepreneur
 
- The opportunity to influence and develop the brand
 
- Long-term cooperation with the right person
 
- An inspiring and growing beauty brand
 

Were you interested?

Send us:

- A short introduction about yourself
 
- Examples of your social media content (IG/TikTok)
 
- Why would you be the right fit for La Chica
 

Come join us in making La Chica even more visible and desirable

title: Nurse
what_we_expect: diagnose the need for medical treatment
implements scientific decision-making in health care
analyze the quality of medical care
use the electronic patient information system in medical care
adheres to the principles of sustainable development in healthcare
what_we_offer: We offer a versatile and varied job description, the opportunity to develop in aesthetic treatments, and work in an expert and customer-oriented operating environment.
Form of work and compensation:

The position has the opportunity to work either under your own business name as a contract entrepreneur or in a part-time employment relationship with our company. Compensation is agreed separately according to the applicant's experience, skills and agreed job description.
jobcontent:
Klinikka Glow - aesthetic treatments and medical services

We are a private healthcare unit operating in the center of Jyväskylä, which has been offering aesthetic treatments since 2012. Our clinic is known for its long experience, established clientele, and commitment to safe, researched, effective and responsibly implemented treatments.

Job duties:

We are looking for a nurse for versatile tasks at the clinic for aesthetic treatments. In addition to tasks related to aesthetic treatments, the work includes working at a specialist doctor's office and assisting with minor procedures. The position emphasizes customer service, a flexible approach to work and the desire to develop one's own skills.

We expect from the applicant:

We require nurse training and certification. We expect the applicant to have either experience in aesthetic treatments or a strong interest in training in the field. We value excellent customer service and interaction skills, initiative, responsibility and flexibility. An interest in the aesthetic field, an entrepreneurial attitude and an understanding of customer-oriented service work are considered an advantage.

We offer:

We offer a versatile and varied job description, the opportunity to develop in aesthetic treatments, and work in an expert and customer-oriented operating environment.

Form of work and compensation:

The position has the opportunity to work either under your own business name as a contract entrepreneur or in a part-time employment relationship with our company. Compensation is agreed separately according to the applicant's experience, skills and agreed job description.

We are a private healthcare unit operating in the center of Jyväskylä, which has been offering aesthetic treatments since 2012. Our clinic is known for its long experience, established clientele, and commitment to safe, researched, effective and responsibly implemented treatments.

Applying:

Send an application and CV, where you tell about your skills, work experience and your interest in the position. Please also tell us about your possible experience with aesthetic treatments or your desire to train in the field, your desired type of work. We invite applicants to a personal job interview based on the applications.

title: Supervisor of preventive work, Tampere
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: If you are interested in supporting disadvantaged children and young people and you have a productive, upbeat coaching personality, you are probably the person we are looking for.

We expect you to have an AMK-level education in social, youth or educational fields suitable for the position, as well as experience working with people of different ages. We consider experience in guiding volunteers an advantage.

The person we're looking for is open-minded, innovative, holistic and self-directed and has good communication skills. He knows how to work in a multicultural operating environment and is able to work flexibly and professionally even in fast-paced situations.
what_we_offer: SOS-Lapsikylä supports the coping of the staff, e.g. with the possibility of comprehensive occupational health care and exercise and well-being benefits. In addition, we support lunch meals and offer our personnel leisure insurance.
We comply with the collective agreement of social sector organizations and the task belongs to demand group 4.
More information:
The application form can be found at the bottom of the page. We hope to hear from you soon! According to the contract, the work assignment will start as soon as possible. #_msocom_3#_msocom_4
The applicant for the position must present an extract from the criminal record: Act on investigating the criminal background of those working with children 504/2002.
SOS Children's Village
On the way to the dimensions of possibilities.
_msocom_5
jobcontent:
Courage | Commitment | Trust | Effectiveness | Responsibility

We at SOS-Lapsikylä bravely defend the rights of the child. Our goal is that every child and young person gets the support they need to grow to their full potential. Come and do meaningful and impactful work with us!

We are applying to SOS-Lapsikylä

Preventive work instructor for the Tampere area

What are we looking for?

We are looking for a preventive work instructor with organizational skills and know-how for the preventive work of SOS-Lapsikylä in the Tampere area. The employment is full-time and fixed-term until 31 December 2026.

The supervisor of preventive work implements and develops SOS-Lapsikylä's preventive work of general benefit in his own area of ​​operation together with the regional supervisor of preventive work. The supervisor is partly responsible for the development, planning and implementation of existing preventive work activities. In addition, the instructor participates in network work, guiding volunteers, and other planning and development work for preventive activities in the area.

Preventive work activities carried out in the area include, for example, the hobby support and study support of the Dreams come true program, the involvement of SOS young developers and the Time for a Child adult friend activity.

At the beginning of the employment relationship, the task includes the following areas:

- Development and implementation of the "Time for the child" activity for adult friends
- Responsible for the decisions and payments of the hobby support and study support of the Dream come true program
- Planning and supervision of SOS-Lapsikylä's local SOS developer youth participation activities
- Representing SOS-Lapsikylä at regional events

What do we expect from you?

If you are interested in supporting disadvantaged children and young people and you have a productive, upbeat coaching personality, you are probably the person we are looking for.

We expect you to have an AMK-level education in social, youth or educational fields suitable for the position, as well as experience working with people of different ages. We consider experience in guiding volunteers an advantage.

The person we're looking for is open-minded, innovative, holistic and self-directed and has good communication skills. He knows how to work in a multicultural operating environment and is able to work flexibly and professionally even in fast-paced situations.

Since the position requires good individual and group guidance skills for children and young people, we hope that you have experience in these areas. Experience in child protection and/or youth work, knowledge of support services for families with children and management of participation methods, and experience in participation activities are an advantage. A driver's license is an advantage.

What do we offer?

We offer you a versatile and responsible position in the expert organization of a children's organization. We use a flexible hybrid work model and you have the opportunity to work self-directed and independently with the support of the work community. SOS-Lapsikylä's electronic learning environment Village School supports your familiarization.

SOS-Lapsikylä supports the coping of the staff, e.g. with the possibility of comprehensive occupational health care and exercise and well-being benefits. In addition, we support lunch meals and offer our personnel leisure insurance.

We comply with the collective agreement of social sector organizations and the task belongs to demand group 4.

More information:

For more information about the task, please contact Kati Syrjäaho, regional head of preventive work, phone: 044 761 4172, kati.syrjaaho@sos-lapsikyla.fi (Tuesday 14.4. from 12-13 and Mon. 20.4. from 13-14)

The job interviews will be held on Monday, May 4, 2026, from 12 to 4 p.m

Apply for the position by 26 April 2026 using the electronic application form on our website at https://sos-lapsikyla.rekrytointi.com/paikat/?o=A_A&jid=634

The application form can be found at the bottom of the page. We hope to hear from you soon! According to the contract, the work assignment will start as soon as possible. #_msocom_3#_msocom_4

The applicant for the position must present an extract from the criminal record: Act on investigating the criminal background of those working with children 504/2002.

SOS Children's Village

SOS-Lapsikylä is an international child protection organization that promotes children's rights. Our goal is that every child and young person gets the support they need to grow to their full potential. We are a non-profit child protection expert, service provider and helper for children, young people and families. SOS-Lapsikylä has been operating in Finland since 1962, and it is a member of the international [SOS Children's Villages organization](http://www.sos-childrensvillages.org/). The organization operates in more than 130 countries.

[sos-lapsikyla.fi](https://www.sos-lapsikyla.fi/) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sos-children's-villages-finland/) | [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/SOSLapsikyla)

On the way to the dimensions of possibilities.

#_msocom_5

title: Timlärare i huvudsyssla för utbildning som handler för examensutbildning (Hux)
company: Svenska Österbottens förbund för utbildning och kultur
jobcontent:
We are looking for you who like to handle, are flexible and can take your own initiative, who like to work with different types of students and are good at collaborating and building a network. 
Vi värdesätter kunnande i particular stöt, kännedom om utbildningssystemet och olika yrkens yrkeskrav samt vilja och käggi att mångsidigt handleda studeranden inom ramen för HUX-utbildningen. 

Behörighetskrav enligt örðurning om behörighetsvíllor (986/1998). 
Anställningsvillor enligt UKTA del C
Enligt lagen om control av brottslig background hos personer som arbeiter med barn (504/2002) bör den som vähls uppvisa ett straffregisterutdrag för att valet ska vinna laga kraft.

Placeringsorten som nämns i annonsenen är placingringsorten vid anställnings präger.

Rekryteringen är anonym rekrytering för att förmår rätvis och jämilk behandling av ansökningar under hela rekryteringsprocessen. 
I Anonyma rekryteringar betalilas ansökningar anonymt tills man har goryot interviewvalen. Since the recruitment is anonymous, no bilagor bifogas application, utan de uppvisas först vid eventual interview. Undvik even such information in the application som kan ge closer information om din identit.

YA is part of the samkommunen Svenska Österbottens förbund för utbildning och kultur with fixed operating points in Närpes, Vasa, Pedersöre and Jakobstad. Yrkesakademin i Österbotten has approx. 190 employees and approx. 2600 students.

Utbildningschef Brita Brännbacka-Brunell, phone 050-369 46 26, brita.brannbacka-brunell@yrkesakademin.fi
translated_content:
Timlärare i huvudsyssla för utbildning som handler för examensutbildning (Hux)

We are looking for you who like to handle, are flexible and can take your own initiative, who like to work with different types of students and are good at collaborating and building a network. 
Vi värdesätter kunnande i particular stöt, kännedom om utbildningssystemet och olika yrkens yrkeskrav samt vilja och käggi att mångsidigt handleda studeranden inom ramen för HUX-utbildningen. 

Behörighetskrav enligt örðurning om behörighetsvíllor (986/1998). 
Anställningsvillor enligt UKTA del C
Enligt lagen om control av brottslig background hos personer som arbeiter med barn (504/2002) bör den som vähls uppvisa ett straffregisterutdrag för att valet ska vinna laga kraft.

Placeringsorten som nämns i annonsenen är placingringsorten vid anställnings präger.

Rekryteringen är anonym rekrytering för att förmår rätvis och jämilk behandling av ansökningar under hela rekryteringsprocessen. 
I Anonyma rekryteringar betalilas ansökningar anonymt tills man har goryot interviewvalen. Since the recruitment is anonymous, no bilagor bifogas application, utan de uppvisas först vid eventual interview. Undvik even such information in the application som kan ge closer information om din identit.

YA is part of the samkommunen Svenska Österbottens förbund för utbildning och kultur with fixed operating points in Närpes, Vasa, Pedersöre and Jakobstad. Yrkesakademin i Österbotten has approx. 190 employees and approx. 2600 students.

Utbildningschef Brita Brännbacka-Brunell, phone 050-369 46 26, brita.brannbacka-brunell@yrkesakademin.fi
